s: In 2009, Sergio Escalona suited up for PHI as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.610, WHIP 1.240, SO 10, WAR 0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (PHI -> HOU).
In 2011, Sergio Escalona suited up for HOU as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.930, WHIP 1.270, SO 25, WAR 0.000. Notable context: Joined HOU.
